name: Greenhouse
description: Monitor Greenhouse recruiting pipeline and user access for HR compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Greenhouse
2. Go to Configure > Dev Center > API Credential Management
3. Create a Harvest API Key (or use existing)
4. Grant appropriate endpoint permissions
5. Copy the API key and paste it below as the username (leave password blank)

Note: The Harvest v1/v2 API will be deprecated on August 31, 2026. Greenhouse is transitioning to Harvest v3.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Greenhouse users and verifies access is appropriate

checks.name: Employee Descriptions
checks.description: Verifies Greenhouse has job postings with proper descriptions
